summary: Backend testing complete for Company Admin CRUD and Real-Time Sync endpoints. 24/24 tests pass in new test file, 9/9 tests pass in updated universal_pos tests (33 total). Core functionality verified: Agent CRUD, POS Devices, Tickets, Activity Logs, Lottery Catalog Toggle with Config Version sync, POS Rules, Blocked Numbers, Sales Limits, Reports, Device Config, Device Sync.

critical.issue: Routing conflict - GET /agents/{id} goes to company_admin_routes.py which expects user_id, but list endpoint from company_routes.py returns agent_id. Different values cause 404. Workaround: use user_id from list response for GET detail.

action_items: FIX ROUTING CONFLICT: Both company_routes.py and company_admin_routes.py share /api/company prefix. GET /agents/{id} from company_admin_routes expects user_id but list from company_routes returns agent_id. Consider adding explicit GET /agents/{agent_id} route to company_routes.py OR change company_admin_routes.py prefix to /api/admin/company
critical_code_review_comments: Agent ID inconsistency: agents collection uses agent_id, users collection uses user_id. GET /{id} expects user_id but list returns agent_id.
Lottery toggle correctly increments config version (verified with test)
Device sync with version checking works correctly - config_changed flag properly set
All CRUD endpoints for Blocked Numbers and Sales Limits working
Reports endpoint returns proper structure with totals
seed_data_creation: Tests created temporary test agents, blocked numbers, and sales limits which were cleaned up after tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Company Admin CRUD endpoints tested. Real-time sync working - config version increments on lottery toggle, device sync detects changes. IMPORTANT: GET /api/company/agents/{id} expects user_id (from users collection), not agent_id (from agents collection due to routing conflict between company_routes.py and company_admin_routes.py).

company_admin_endpoints.GET /api/company/agents: PASS - Returns list of agents with agent_id and user_id
company_admin_endpoints.POST /api/company/agents: PASS - Creates agent with name, username, password, email fields
company_admin_endpoints.PUT /api/company/agents/{id}: PASS - Updates agent (uses agent_id from agents collection)
company_admin_endpoints.GET /api/company/agents/{id}: PASS - Works with user_id only (routing conflict noted)
company_admin_endpoints.GET /api/company/tickets: PASS - Returns tickets list with filters
company_admin_endpoints.GET /api/company/lottery-catalog: PASS - Returns lotteries with enabled flag
company_admin_endpoints.PUT /api/company/lottery-catalog/{id}/to: PASS - Toggles lottery and increments config version
company_admin_endpoints.GET /api/company/reports/sales: PASS - Returns sales report with totals

device_sync_endpoints.GET /api/device/config: PASS - Returns full device config with config_version, enabled_lotteries, blocked_numbers, sales_limits, pos_rules, prime_configs
device_sync_endpoints.GET /api/device/sync: PASS - Returns config_version, config_changed flag, latest_results, daily_stats, balance, agent_status

agent_endpoints.POST /api/lottery/sell: PASS - Creates lottery ticket (if lottery enabled and sales open)
agent_endpoints.GET /api/results/today: PASS - Returns today's results for enabled lotteries

real_time_sync_verification.config_version_increment_on_toggle: PASS - Version increments from N to N+1 on lottery toggle
real_time_sync_verification.device_sync_detects_change: PASS - config_changed=True when agent version < server version
real_time_sync_verification.enabled_lotteries_sent_on_change: PASS - enabled_lotteries array populated when config_changed=True

rca_of_the_issue.root_cause: Routing conflict between company_routes.py and company_admin_routes.py. Both use prefix /api/company. GET /agents endpoint comes from company_routes.py (registered first), returning agent_id from agents collection. But GET /agents/{agent_id} falls through to company_admin_routes.py which queries users collection with user_id. Since agent_id != user_id, the query fails.
reproduction_steps: 2. GET /api/company/agents/agent_XXX - returns 404 because it searches users.user_id
3. GET /api/company/agents/user_YYY (where user_YYY is the user_id) - returns 200
rca_of_the_issue.mitigation: Use user_id field from list response when calling GET /agents/{id}
rca_of_the_issue.recommended_fix: Add GET /agents/{agent_id} route to company_routes.py to handle agent lookup by agent_id
